lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: Tommy stepped off the bus and looked around the bustling station. He clutched his backpack tightly, feeling a mix of excitement and nervousness. Who stepped off the bus?

translations.Somali: Tommy wuxuu ka degay baska oo fiiriyey saldhigga mashquulka badan. Wuxuu si adag u qabsaday boorsadiisa dhabarka, isagoo dareemaya isku dhafka farxadda iyo welwelka. Yaa ka degay baska?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: Yes, Tommy, Tommy stepped off the bus. He took a deep breath, absorbing the unfamiliar sights and sounds of the station, his nervousness began to fade, replaced by a warm sense of belonging. How was Tommy feeling now?

translations.Somali: Haa, Tommy, Tommy ayaa ka degay baska. Wuxuu si qoto dheer u neefsanayey, isagoo la qabsanaaya muuqaalada iyo codadka aan caadiga ahayn ee saldhigga, welwelkiisii wuxuu bilaabay inuu yaraado, iyadoo lagu bedelayo dareen diirran oo ah inuu gurigiisii joogo. Sidee ayuu Tommy hadda dareemayaa?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: Warmth and a sense of belonging - that's right. However, Tommy wasn't staying long. He was just passing through on his way to a summer camp nestled in the mountains. Where was Tommy heading to?

translations.Somali: Diirimaad iyo dareen ka mid noqosho - waa sax. Si kastaba ha ahaatee, Tommy ma joogin muddo dheer. Wuxuu ahaa mid maraya isaga oo u socda xero xagaaga oo ku taal buuraleyda. Halkee ayuu Tommy ku wajahnaa?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: To a summer camp. Tommy was on his way to a summer camp. After meeting his grandmother, Tommy was now looking for a new bus ticket. Why was he looking for a new bus ticket though?

translations.Somali: Xero xagaaga. Tommy wuxuu ku wajahnaa xero xagaaga. Ka dib markuu la kulmay ayeeyadiis, Tommy wuxuu hadda raadinayaa tigidh cusub oo bas. Laakiin maxay ahayd sababta uu tigidh cusub oo bas u raadinayey?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: To get another bus. He needed another bus so he could get to the summer camp. They walked together to the ticket counter, where he explained his destination to the friendly clerk. Was he successful in getting a new bus ticket?

translations.Somali: Si uu u raaco bas kale. Wuxuu u baahnaa bas kale si uu u tago xero xagaaga. Waxay wada socdeen ilaa kaarka tigidhada, halkaas oo uu u sharxay meesha uu ku wajahnaa kaaliyaha saaxiibtinimada leh. Ma ku guuleystay inuu helo tigidh cusub oo bas?

lesson.title: Answer out loud
lesson.text: Yes, he was. He got a new ticket. He explained everything to the friendly clerk and he was now excited to resume his journey.

translations.Somali: Haa, wuu ku guuleystay. Wuxuu helay tigidh cusub. Wuxuu wax walba u sharxay kaaliyaha saaxiibtinimada leh, wuxuuna hadda ku faraxsanaa inuu dib u bilaabo safarkiisa.
